message:
feat(core): optimize hot paths across fnp-io, fnp-iter, fnp-linalg, fnp-ndarray, and fnp-ufunc

Introduce targeted performance optimizations to the five core crates
while preserving strict behavioral parity with the original
implementations. Each change includes an isomorphism test proving the
optimized path returns identical results to the legacy code path.

fnp-io (P2C-009):
  - Replace BTreeSet with pre-allocated HashSet in
    synthesize_npz_member_names for O(1) amortized lookups on
    duplicate-name detection, eliminating unnecessary ordering overhead
    on member-name sets that are never iterated in sorted order.

fnp-iter (P2C-004):
  - Extract count_true_mask() with manual 8-wide loop unrolling over
    bool slices, replacing the filter-count iterator in
    count_selected_indices. The unrolled loop avoids per-element
    branch-prediction misses on large boolean masks used during
    flatiter indexing. A new test (bool_mask_count_matches_reference)
    exhaustively validates equivalence across 64-element, 257-element,
    and 511-element masks with varying true-density patterns.

fnp-linalg (P2C-008):
  - Add fast-path match arms for 0-, 1-, and 2-rank batch prefixes in
    validate_matrix_shape, bypassing the generic try_fold iterator for
    the overwhelmingly common 2D, 3D, and 4D input tensors. A new
    legacy_validate_matrix_shape reference implementation and
    matrix_shape_fast_paths_are_isomorphic_with_legacy_path test
    confirm bit-exact equivalence across 13 fixture shapes including
    overflow and budget-exceeded edge cases.

fnp-ndarray:
  - Add early-return fast paths in broadcast_shape for the two most
    common call patterns: (a) identical shapes (immediate clone return)
    and (b) equal-rank shapes (single zip pass without padding logic).
    Two new tests validate the axis-wise merge and identity-shape
    preservation invariants.

fnp-ufunc:
  - Add a same-shape fast path in elementwise_binary that skips stride
    computation and multi-index broadcast iteration when both operand
    shapes are identical, performing a direct zip-map instead. The
    dtype promotion is hoisted above the branch to ensure the output
    dtype is always computed identically regardless of path.

Documentation:
  - AGENTS.md and README.md updated to register the new
    run_performance_budget_gate binary and its companion e2e wrapper
    script in the canonical command index, and document the performance
    budget baseline-delta report artifact path.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -186,11 +186,13 @@ cargo test --workspace --all-features
 cargo run -p fnp-conformance --bin capture_numpy_oracle
 cargo run -p fnp-conformance --bin run_ufunc_differential
 cargo run -p fnp-conformance --bin generate_benchmark_baseline
+cargo run -p fnp-conformance --bin run_performance_budget_gate
 cargo run -p fnp-conformance --bin generate_raptorq_sidecars
 cargo run -p fnp-conformance --bin validate_phase2c_packet -- --packet-id FNP-P2C-001
 cargo run -p fnp-conformance --bin run_security_gate
 cargo run -p fnp-conformance --bin run_test_contract_gate
 cargo run -p fnp-conformance --bin run_workflow_scenario_gate
+scripts/e2e/run_performance_budget_gate.sh
 scripts/e2e/run_security_policy_gate.sh

 scripts/e2e/run_workflow_scenario_gate.sh

@@ -53,11 +53,13 @@ Program doctrine:

 cargo run -p fnp-conformance --bin run_security_gate

+scripts/e2e/run_performance_budget_gate.sh

@@ -79,6 +81,7 @@ Notes:
 - Security threat controls are machine-mapped in `artifacts/contracts/security_control_checks_v1.yaml`.
 - Runtime-policy e2e logs are emitted as JSONL under `artifacts/logs/` by `run_security_gate` / `scripts/e2e/run_security_policy_gate.sh`.
 - Workflow-scenario e2e logs are emitted as JSONL under `artifacts/logs/` by `run_workflow_scenario_gate` / `scripts/e2e/run_workflow_scenario_gate.sh`.
+- Performance budget baseline-delta reports are emitted under `artifacts/logs/` by `run_performance_budget_gate` / `scripts/e2e/run_performance_budget_gate.sh`.
 - Test/logging conventions are locked in `artifacts/contracts/test_logging_contract_v1.json` and `artifacts/contracts/TESTING_AND_LOGGING_CONVENTIONS_V1.md`.
 
 ## Repository Layout
